summary: Task-class → model routing for the inference broker. Local-only by default; add NIM models after `frontier model probe nvidia-nim` produces empirical capacity numbers.

routine_summary.summary: Cheap log compression + pack rendering. Local first.

patch_builder.summary: Generate code patches in isolated worktrees. Local-only on this host until NIM is enabled. qwen2.5:72b is primary; deepseek-coder:33b-instruct was tried as the diversity alt but produced 0 collected diffs across 5 attempts on 2026-04-27 — it returns prose without a fenced diff block, so the diff extractor finds nothing. Re-add when a code-shaped frontier model (e.g. qwen2.5-coder:14b once pulled) is available.

adversarial_review.summary: Attack a candidate patch. Diversity matters more than raw quality. deepseek-coder is the primary attacker (code-aware); qwen2.5:72b reviews from a general-knowledge angle.

research_extraction.summary: Read sources and produce a claim ledger.

merge_arbiter.summary: Final merge recommendation. Stays on the strongest trusted model. Empty until a frontier model is wired explicitly — broker will return a clear error rather than guess.
